title: Create Venture
description: Exploration Modpack with Create and Valkyrie Skies
body:
Exploration modpack with vanilla like structures, little modifications on biomes, a bunch of new gears and more hard configured mobs, focused on better adventure through most ways than just wandering around.

Some extend of recipes and items are removed, reforged or the recipes are entirelly remade to balance and better integrate the mods.

A dedicated resource pack for Things Mod are also included and **highly recommended**, since the new textures are made to match the modified recipes.

**Full list of mods:**
- Advanced Netherite
- Animal Feeding Trough
- Another Furniture
- Antique Atlas 4
- AppleSkin
